title: Pixabay Image Scraper
description: Scrape images from Pixabay using their internal bootstrap API. Provide either a Pixabay search URL or keyword. Supports pagination and proxy configuration.

url.title: Pixabay URL
url.description: Full Pixabay search URL, e.g. https://pixabay.com/images/search/nature/ — overrides keyword if provided.

keyword.title: Keyword
keyword.description: Search keyword(s), e.g. 'nature', 'sunset', 'city skyline'. Used if URL is not provided.

results_wanted.title: Maximum number of images
results_wanted.description: Maximum number of images to collect. Leave empty to collect all available.

max_pages.title: Maximum number of pages
max_pages.description: Maximum number of pages to scrape. Each page returns ~100 images.

proxyConfiguration.title: Proxy configuration
proxyConfiguration.description: Proxy configuration (Residential group recommended to bypass Cloudflare 403 blocks). Completely optional — toggle off to run without a proxy.
